tool.name: Group CDS by orthogroup
tool.description: emit per-orthogroup CDS and peptide multifastas as paired list collections
tool.command: ## Galaxy stores datasets as .dat; pyfaidx needs real FASTAs to index ## alongside, and gene IDs must be matched per strain. Stage the reference, ## then build <strain>\t<path> manifests over the two parallel query list ## collections (keyed by element_identifier = strain). ln -s '$ref_fasta' ref.fasta && ln -s '$ref_gff' ref.gff3 && mkdir -p staged ogs && #for $g in $query_gff ln -s '$g' 'staged/${g.element_identifier}.gff3' && printf '%s\t%s\n' '$g.element_identifier' 'staged/${g.element_identifier}.gff3' >> gff_manifest.tsv && #end for #for $f in $query_fasta ln -s '$f' 'staged/${f.element_identifier}.fasta' && printf '%s\t%s\n' '$f.element_identifier' 'staged/${f.element_identifier}.fasta' >> fasta_manifest.tsv && #end for python '$__tool_directory__/group_cds_by_og.py' --ortho '$ortho' --ref '$ref_name' --ref-gff ref.gff3 --ref-fasta ref.fasta --query-gff-manifest gff_manifest.tsv --query-fasta-manifest fasta_manifest.tsv --min-intact $min_intact --out-dir ogs --log-level INFO

param.label: Ortholog table (TSV)
param.help: ortholog_table.tsv from the consensus step. Must have an orthogroup_id column and one column per strain (header = strain name) holding gene IDs or '-'.

param.label: Reference strain name
param.help: Must match the reference column header in the ortholog table.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.label: Reference GFF3
param.help: The reference strain's own fixed GFF3. CDS features are read for the reference gene models.

param.label: Reference softmasked FASTA
param.help: The reference (softmasked) genome. Seqids must match the GFF chrom column.

param.name: query_gff
param.label: Per-query merged GFF3 collection
param.help: A 'list' collection of per-query merged annotation GFF3s; element identifier = strain name (must match the ortholog-table column and the FASTA collection).

param.name: query_fasta
param.label: Per-query softmasked FASTA collection
param.help: A 'list' collection of per-query softmasked FASTAs; element identifier = strain name (parallel to the GFF collection).

param.label: Minimum intact query members per orthogroup
param.help: Only orthogroups with at least this many intact QUERY members (queries with an extractable CDS; the reference is not counted) are emitted. Matches v3 build_msa.py semantics.

tool.help:
**Group CDS by orthogroup** — the CDS-grouping core of the Pv4 pangenome codon/protein MSA builder, exposed as a standalone helper.
For every orthogroup in `ortholog_table.tsv` that has at least **`--min-intact`** intact **query** members (the reference strain is not counted toward this threshold, matching v3 `build_msa.py`), this tool emits two per-orthogroup multifastas:
- `{og}.cds.fa` — nucleotide **CDS**, one record per member strain. CDS is reconstructed from the GFF `CDS` segments against the (softmasked) genome FASTA (`pyfaidx`), reverse-complemented on the minus strand, with in-frame internal stop codons replaced by `NNN` and the sequence codon-truncated so its length is a multiple of 3. - `{og}.pep.fa` — **protein**, one record per member strain (`translate`, trailing `*` stripped). Orthogroups whose **reference** CDS carries an internal stop codon are dropped entirely.
The reference strain is read from its own fixed GFF3; each query strain from its merged annotation GFF3. Gene IDs are matched on the normalized gene id (the Liftoff extra-copy suffix is collapsed).
-----
**Inputs**
- *Ortholog table* — `ortholog_table.tsv`; needs an `orthogroup_id` column plus one column per strain (header = strain name) holding gene IDs or `-`. - *Reference name / GFF3 / softmasked FASTA* — the reference strain. - *Per-query merged GFF3 collection* and *Per-query softmasked FASTA collection* — two parallel `list` collections keyed by strain (`element_identifier`). - *Minimum intact members* — orthogroup member threshold.
**Outputs**
- Two parallel `list` collections, `cds` and `pep`, each keyed by the orthogroup id, holding `{og}.cds.fa` / `{og}.pep.fa`. For any orthogroup the two collections are codon-consistent: `len(cds_record) == 3 * len(pep_record)`.
-----
The downstream alignment (MAFFT / pal2nal / trimal) is intentionally **not** performed here — those are separate IUC tool steps.
Extracted from `Pv4-pangenome/v3/pipeline/impl/scripts/build_msa.py` (CDS-grouping core).
